2604.13630.title: SafeHarness: Lifecycle-Integrated Security Architecture for LLM-based Agent Deployment
2604.13630.paper_summary: The performance of large language model (LLM) agents depends critically on the execution harness, the system layer that orchestrates tool use, context management, and state persistence. Yet this same architectural centrality makes the harness a high-value attack surface: a single compromise at the harness level can cascade through the entire execution pipeline. We observe that existing security approaches suffer from structural mismatch, leaving them blind to harness-internal state and unable to coordinate across the different phases of agent operation. In this paper, we introduce \safeharness{}, a security architecture in which four proposed defense layers are woven directly into the agent lifecycle to address above significant limitations: adversarial context filtering at input processing, tiered causal verification at decision making, privilege-separated tool control at action execution, and safe rollback with adaptive degradation at state update. The proposed cross-layer mechanisms tie these layers together, escalating verification rigor, triggering rollbacks, and tightening tool privileges whenever sustained anomalies are detected. We evaluate \safeharness{} on benchmark datasets across diverse harness configurations, comparing against four security baselines under five attack scenarios spanning six threat categories. Compared to the unprotected baseline, \safeharness{} achieves an average reduction of approximately 38\% in UBR and 42\% in ASR, substantially lowering both the unsafe behavior rate and the attack success rate while preserving core task utility.
2604.13630.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLM）代理的性能在很大程度上依賴於執行工具，這是一個協調工具使用、上下文管理和狀態持久性的系統層。然而，這種架構的中心性使得執行工具成為高價值的攻擊面：在執行工具層級的單一妥協可以在整個執行管道中引發連鎖反應。我們觀察到現有的安全方法存在結構不匹配的問題，使其對執行工具內部狀態無法察覺，並且無法在代理操作的不同階段之間進行協調。在本文中，我們介紹了\safeharness{}，這是一種安全架構，其中四個提議的防禦層直接編織進代理的生命周期，以解決上述重大限制：在輸入處理階段進行對抗性上下文過濾，在決策階段進行分層因果驗證，在行動執行階段進行特權分離的工具控制，以及在狀態更新階段進行安全回滾和自適應降級。所提出的跨層機制將這些層結合在一起，提升驗證的嚴謹性，觸發回滾，並在檢測到持續異常時收緊工具特權。我們在不同的執行工具配置的基準數據集上評估\safeharness{}，並在涵蓋六種威脅類別的五種攻擊場景下，與四個安全基準進行比較。與未保護的基準相比，\safeharness{}在UBR上實現了約38\%的平均減少，在ASR上實現了42\%的減少，顯著降低了不安全行為率和攻擊成功率，同時保留了核心任務的效用。
2604.13630.author: Xixun Lin et.al.
2604.13630.authors: Xixun Lin, Yang Liu, Yancheng Chen, Yongxuan Wu, Yucheng Ning, Yilong Liu, Nan Sun, Shun Zhang, Bin Chong, Chuan Zhou, Yanan Cao, Li Guo
